title: Software Engineer
description: Designs, develops, and maintains software applications.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyzes data to help businesses make informed decisions.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, or equivalent

title: Product Manager
description: Defines product vision and leads cross-functional teams to deliver value.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Business or related field
experience: 3+ years product or project management experience
